descript.abstract: This dataset consists of summary data for potential landscape sources of per- and poly-fluoroalkyl substances (PFAS). These summary items include facilities from the Environmental Protection Agency (EPA) PFAS Analytics Tools, which were pulled from its Enforcement and Compliance History Online (ECHO), areas affected by fires (burned and urban burned areas) from Monitoring Trends in Burn Severity (MTBS), and landcover data from National Land Cover Dataset (NLCD) and Coastal Change Analysis Portal (C-CAP) around sites sampled as part of a National PFAS Tapwater Reconnaissance. These data are presented as a comma separated file, which includes summaries for all variables listed within a 5-kilometer buffer around each site, with an additional summary of burn areas within a 50-kilometer buffer. The purpose of this effort is to identify and quantify PFAS in drinking water sources at the point-of-use across the United States (US) and these data will be used to identify potential landscape-scale drivers of PFAS contamination in US tapwater (TW).
descript.purpose: This tabular dataset describes landscape characteristics for areas surrounding sites sampled as part of the PFAS National Tapwater Reconnaissance.

place.placekey: Virgin Islands of the United States

idinfo.accconst: None. Please see 'Distribution Info' for details.
idinfo.useconst: None. Users are advised to read the dataset's metadata thoroughly to understand appropriate use and data limitations.

cntperp.cntorg: U.S. Geological Survey, ROCKY MOUNTAIN REGION

attracc.attraccr: No formal attribute accuracy tests were conducted

dataqual.logic: No formal logical accuracy tests were conducted
dataqual.complete: Dataset is considered complete for the information presented, as described in the abstract. Users are advised to read the rest of the metadata record for additional details.

horizpa.horizpar: No formal positional accuracy tests were conducted

vertacc.vertaccr: No formal positional accuracy tests were conducted

citeinfo.title: EPA PFAS Analytics tool, Handling Industry Sectors Layer
citeinfo.othercit: EPA developed datasets from various sources that show which industries may be handling PFAS – and which facilities EPA has records about within those industries.

srcinfo.srccontr: Data points were used in the summary of landscape characteristics at study sites
Dataset was used to summarize burned areas within an area surrounding the study sites
Dataset was used to summarize land cover types within an area surrounding the study sites; data covered CONUS and Alaska

citeinfo.title: Coastal Change Analysis Program
citeinfo.othercit: Nationally standardized, raster-based inventories of land cover for the coastal areas of the U.S. Data are derived, through the Coastal Change Analysis Program, from the analysis of multiple dates of remotely sensed imagery.

srcinfo.srccontr: Dataset was used to summarize land cover types within an area surrounding the study sites; data covered Hawaiian Islands and US Territories

procstep.procdesc: 1) MTBS data were downloaded and converted from vector to raster using the Polygon to Raster tool. The raster was then resampled to a 100m cell size. 2) Burn areas within the 5km and 50km buffers were summarized using the Zonal Statistics as Table tool. 3) NLCD and C-CAP urban areas were identified and resampled to a 100m cell size. MTBS was clipped to these urban areas. Urban burn areas were summarized using the Zonal Statistics as Table tool for both the 5km and 50km buffers around the study sites.

PFAS Industry Sector facilities data were downloaded through the online EPA Analytics Tool. This dataset includes point locations as well as descriptors of industry and industry category. Duplicates were removed based on UID and facility name, prioritizing the more generalized industry category. All records were manually checked. Records that were obtained where location was identified as state centroid were also removed. The Generate Near Table tool was used to identify the UID and distance from the study point for each facility within a 5km buffer.

enttyp.enttypd: Tabulated data describing landscape characteristics (land cover, burned area, PFAS-related facilities) surrounding tapwater sites within 5km and 50km buffers

attr.attrdef: Project defined site names for each tapwater sample collected, 2016-2021

attrdomv.udom: Project defined site names for each tapwater sample collected, 2016-2021

attr.attrdef: Name of study
Number of PFAS source facilities identified from EPA PFAS Analytics Tools within a 5km buffer; individual facility information can be found in PFAS_ECHOfacilities_5km.csv

edom.edomvd: No known PFAS source facilities within a 5km buffer

attr.attrdef: Mean distance to PFAS source facilities within the 5km buffer; individual facility information can be found in PFAS_ECHOfacilities_5km.csv

edom.edomvd: No known PFAS source facilities within a 5km buffer

attr.attrdef: Fraction of 5km buffer that is estimated as burned as defined by MTBS. Calculated as area burned divided by total 5km buffer area

edom.edomvd: No known burned area within the 5km buffer

attr.attrdef: Fraction of 50km buffer that is estimated as burned as defined by MTBS. Calculated as area burned divided by total 50km buffer area

edom.edomvd: No known burned area within the 50km buffer

attr.attrdef: Fraction of 5km buffer that is estimated as urban burned as defined by MTBS. Calculated as urban area burned divided by total 5km buffer area

edom.edomvd: No known urban burned area within the 5km buffer

attr.attrdef: Fraction of 50km buffer that is estimated as urban burned as defined by MTBS. Calculated as urban area burned divided by total 50km buffer area

edom.edomvd: No known urban burned area within the 50km buffer

attr.attrdef: Open Water as defined by NLCD or C-CAP. Fraction of 5km buffer area
Perennial Ice/Snow as defined by NLCD or C-CAP. Fraction of 5km buffer area
Developed-Open Space as defined by NLCD or C-CAP. Fraction of 5km buffer area
Developed-Low Intensity as defined by NLCD or C-CAP. Fraction of 5km buffer area
Developed-Medium Intensity as defined by NLCD or C-CAP. Fraction of 5km buffer area
Developed-High Intensity as defined by NLCD or C-CAP. Fraction of 5km buffer area
Barren as defined by NLCD or C-CAP. Fraction of 5km buffer area
Deciduous Forest as defined by NLCD or C-CAP. Fraction of 5km buffer area
Evergreen Forest as defined by NLCD or C-CAP. Fraction of 5km buffer area
Mixed Forest as defined by NLCD or C-CAP. Fraction of 5km buffer area
Dwarf Scrub as defined by NLCD or C-CAP. Fraction of 5km buffer area
Shrub/Scrub as defined by NLCD or C-CAP. Fraction of 5km buffer area
Grassland/Herbaceous as defined by NLCD or C-CAP. Fraction of 5km buffer area
Sedge/Herbaceous as defined by NLCD or C-CAP. Fraction of 5km buffer area
Moss as defined by NLCD or C-CAP. Fraction of 5km buffer area
Pasture/Hay as defined by NLCD or C-CAP. Fraction of 5km buffer area
Cultivated Crop as defined by NLCD or C-CAP. Fraction of 5km buffer area
Woody Wetlands as defined by NLCD or C-CAP. Fraction of 5km buffer area
Emergent Herbaceous Wetlands as defined by NLCD or C-CAP. Fraction of 5km buffer area

enttyp.enttypd: Tabulated data describing individual PFAS-related facilities and their characteristics within a 5km buffer of tapwater sites

attr.attrdef: Project defined site names associated with the National Tapwater Study

attrdomv.udom: Project defined site names associated with the National Tapwater Study

attr.attrdef: Project defined site names for each tapwater sample collected, 2016-2021

attrdomv.udom: Project defined site names associated with the National Tapwater Study

attr.attrdef: Potential PFAS facility distance to site in meters, within a 5km buffer

edom.edomvd: No PFAS facilities within 5km buffer of site

attr.attrdef: Manufacturing or chemical production facilities that produce or use PFAS

edom.edomvd: No PFAS facilities within 5km buffer of site

attr.attrdef: Type of production or manufacturing occurring at the listed facility

edom.edomvd: No PFAS facilities within 5km buffer of site

attrdomv.udom: Industry type as defined by NAICS

attr.attrdef: Link to the ECHO facility report

edom.edomvd: No PFAS facilities within 5km buffer of site

attrdomv.udom: Individual link to EPA facilities report

attr.attrdef: Link to the EJSCREEN report

edom.edomvd: No PFAS facilities within 5km buffer of site

attrdomv.udom: Individual link to EPA environmental justice screening report

attr.attrdef: Type of program listed by the EPA

edom.edomvd: No PFAS facilities within 5km buffer of site

cntaddr.address: Denver Federal Center, Building 810, Mail Stop 302

distinfo.distliab: Unless otherwise stated, all data, metadata and related materials are considered to satisfy the quality standards relative to the purpose for which the data were collected. Although these data and associated metadata have been reviewed for accuracy and completeness and approved for release by the U.S. Geological Survey (USGS), no warranty expressed or implied is made regarding the display or utility of the data for other purposes, nor on all computer systems, nor shall the act of distribution constitute any such warranty.

cntperp.cntorg: U.S. Geological Survey, ROCKY MOUNTAIN REGION

metainfo.metstdn: FGDC Biological Data Profile of the Content Standard for Digital Geospatial Metadata
